entry.title: Retention GL
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a client requirement to create a special GL to hold the customer retention amount for until the retention amount is due for receivable.

Can you please help that how can we create a special GL for customer retention Process.

entry.title: Using FMCYCOPI_CO to copy planning in ACDOCP to Budget in FM only 2 dimensions are transferred
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are are implementing BCS to control budget at three levels: Commitment item (derived from account), Fund Center (derived from cost center) and Program (derived from PEP element). We can upload the budget through TCODE FMBB using these three dimensions accordingly.

We have implemented OSS note 3100868 - Data transfer ACDOCP to BCS with its dependencies in order that transaction FMCYCOPI_CO can have planning category instead of planning version.

We have used Fiori app Import financial plan data which creates in ACDOCP entries in which Cost center, Account and PEP element are populated. 

When executing the FMCYCOPI_CO TCODE to copy these CO planning entries to budget in BCS and activating trace on derivation rule I can seee that If I fill the three fields in selection screen (Cost center, account and PEP element) then Cost center appears empty on the trace screen (thererfore fund center can not be derived). If I fill cost center and account then PEP Element does not appear on the trace screen and therefore Program can not be derived. It seems that only two dimensions can be transferred from CO to BCS. Is this right or am I missing something?

entry.title: Including Total Cash Discount Amount in DMEE File
entry.content:
I'm trying to include the total cash discount amount in the DMEE file but haven't had success with the two fields I've attempted (FPAYH-RSKON & FPAYH-RWSKT).

Could you advise which field should be used to display the total cash discount amount? This functionality is important for the client, and they need to ensure this information is added correctly. Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Credit Exposure Diduction
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We face this strange thing in Credit Exposure ( UKM_COMMITMENTS ) first screen Devilry value it was 58,019, and when exiting from transaction and go back again the delivery value decreased to 25,760 and credit exposure changed and decreased in one second to half value

by the way customer has special credit


First Screen

 

Second Screen

 

Thank you

entry.title: Issue for getting Output Format for a SQVI query
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I'm having an issue with solving problems with SQVI queries.

Recently, I made a change (added a field from inside an SQVI query) using Tcode SQ01, and applied a formula to get that field in the Output Report.

This is the query, I didn't change anything here, already it's in 'SAP List Viewer', but when I'm executing it, it doesn't show me any 'Output Format' option-

And, the output report looks like now-

Most importantly, we can't export that report.

But, previously I used to get this like-

The report used to look like-

So, I would think that the report format has been changed somehow and I couldn't figure it out, can somebody please help me out with this?

NOTE: I've seen some  solutions in SAP community but it looks like the links has been broken.

And I'm using SAP ECC system.

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

Sayan Kayal

entry.title: SAP FICO Handling of Expenses Before Sales
entry.content:
Not sure if this is the correct place to post this question - but looking for help with regards to how SAP handles expenses that post to the GL before the sale.  

In our current system - depending if the expense is on a purchase or a sale - the entire (or portion) of the expense will post to a COGS GL account.   However - this isn't great accounting - since we don't have an accurate picture of our actual COGS caused by sales. 

Is there functionality in SAP that would allow expenses to go to a Prepaid Expense account (if there wasn't a sale yet when the expense posted) and then when the sale is made - to move the expense from Prepaid Expenses to the COGS accounts.

entry.title: Special GL
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a requirement where I need to create a Special GL for customer retention so that the retention amount would be on hold in this special GL until the receivable date is due.

 

Can anyone please help me with this as how to move forward with this.

entry.title: Bill against payment
entry.content:
Hai all

I have a one doubt. how to identified in table(BSEG,BSID and BSAD) level. Bill(RV) against payment (DZ). Not for document type wise if any way identification is possible in sap system.

Please explain below cases without document type and Bill wise not for customer wise.

 

TypesBill Credit note Advance PaymentIncoming payment 
Fully Paid 100203050
Partially paid100201020
Not paid100000

entry.title: Asset Write-up (ABZU) for Prior Fiscal year in Prior Fiscal year Special period
entry.content:
Hi,

We have an audit requirement to adjust our prior year depreciation. Two adjustments have been requested:

1. Asset depreciation write-up. i.e. Too much depreciation was posted

2. Asset unplanned depreciation i.e. Too little depreciation was posted

 

For scenario 1, we were not able to post write-up for the prior year , in the prior year's special periods.

Why does SAP behave this way? 

 

For the 2nd scenario we posted Unplanned depreciation (ABAA) using

Transaction: 640 - Unplanned depreciation on prior-year acquisitions

Document date: Today

Posting date: 31.12.2024

Asset value Date: 31.12.2024

Period: 14

Note: We had to open the prior asset FY - No issues!

 

Help appreciated!

entry.title: Configuration path for T-Code OB22 not available
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

I am trying to do a configuration for T-Code OB22 but system is asking to use T-Code FINSC_LEDGER. When I am opening the T-Code FINSC_LEDGER for the configuration, data is not same what I see in T-Code OB22. 

Can someone pls confirm on this?

entry.title: Due date
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I have a query regarding net due date calculation. I have taken payment term 25th of next month and taken baseline date as posting date. For one document it is calculating correct net due date however for other it is calculating wrong due date as it is calculating 60 days from the posting date. 

i have also chexked the payment terms and all looks fine.

please advise.

entry.title: DMEE XML file missing nodes
entry.content:
I maintain a copy of standard CGI_XML_CT tree, where I customize some nodes to comply with local bank requirements.
Some nodes do not appear in output xml file at all.
Example: CdtrAgt->FinInstnId->ClrSysMmbId->MmbId. The node is defined as reference to structure field FPAYH-ZBNKL with status 1-Mandatory.
The tree is activated without errors, in F110 no errors appear during payment medium creation. In table REGUH I can see that field ZBNKL is correctly populated. Despite of this, the node is not contained in the file. Same result if I change the status to Standard.
There is no exit function for this node, no conditions.
What else controlls, if a node is tranferred (even blank - without value) to the payment medium?
Within CdtrAgt->FinInstnId there is also the node BIC, mapped to FPAYH-ZSWIF. This node is transferred to an output file without problems.

thanks for any hint

entry.title: How can we add entry in TKEVG table ?
entry.content:
Hello,

Hello,

 

I have an issue on settlement, KD514.  I configured custom PA transfer structure Z1 but the system always takes the PA transfer structure FI - Direct FI/MM.

I saw that I need to change an entry in TKEVG, but I don't have entry. How can I add an entry ?

Thank you

Regards

Maxime

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/issue-in-pa-transfer-structure-copa/qaq-p/7657651

entry.title: Duplicate check functionality for Accounting Documents
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

We have a scenario, where I need to check if Duplicate check functionality exists in Standard SAP, for scenario listed here. Reference number sometimes matches, while Vendor No & Amount always match. Entries are posted manually or through SAP JOBs. Does standard SAP supports duplicate check for this scenario? If yes - please help to provide details.

Thanks...

entry.title: Account Analysis query
entry.content: I need to develop an SQL query for Account analysis along with related source (sub-ledger, e.g. " Payables, Receivables, Fixed Assets,...)

entry.title: Map Invoice Time and Payment Time Tax Types and Tax Codes
entry.content: I have map invoice and payment tax type and tax code to calculate the withholding tax accumulation at the time of posting the document. but there is no impact. on posting.

entry.title: Attachment mandatory for vendor master data attachment mandatory
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to set attachment as mandatory for vendor master data in SAP ECC ?

If yes, it is possible de set this only for some countries ?

If not, is there any intermediate SAP tools allowing that ? 

Regards, Thank you!

entry.title: FBCJ: Error Message KI 260 only triggered when posting, not saving?
entry.content:
FBCJ transaction could be saved despite cost center is blocked

but when try to post the already saved document, message KI 260 is triggered.

My client need to trigger this message to saving step, not posting. Any idea?

entry.title: TDS Deducted in down payment auto adjust at the time of invoice posting
entry.content: During down payment to vendor, we deducted TDS after that we received invoice for more or less amount. I want to auto adjust TDS deducted at time invoice posting. so how to configure same for auto adjustment and what are prerequisite.

entry.title: Payment term 001 not defined - Message No. F5839
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm getting above subjected error while posting Item Interest Calculation.

I have uploaded the TCODE FINT Calculation screen in attachment.

There is no payment Term 001 available in DB still why I'm getting this error as payment term 001 not defined. I have configured 0001 standard Payment term which is correctly configured.

Please advise how to resolve this error?

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance
